name: Hyderabadi Veg Biryani
steps: Marinate the vegetables in curd, ginger garlic paste, biryani masala and salt for 30 minutes.
Fry the sliced onions until golden and crisp; boil soaked rice until 70 percent done.
Layer marinated vegetables, rice, fried onions, mint and saffron milk in a heavy pot.
Seal the lid and cook on dum on the lowest flame for 25 minutes.
Fluff gently and serve hot with raita.
